tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Skip cast swim jigs with baitcasting gear into tight spaces — docks, catwalks, bushes, overhanging trees, under pontoons. Heavier tackle lets you pull bass away from heavy cover quickly. First cast is critical: stealth provokes reaction bite from fish in shadows. Use heavy line (50lb braid or 20lb fluoro).'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Skip casting with baitcasters: sidearm cast low to water that turns into a tight, quick roll cast. Lure should travel 70-80% of the cast just above water, skip 2-3 times, then land quietly. First cast is critical — a bad cast spooks fish and your one shot is over. It's a deadly combination of stealth and accuracy for pressured fish.'
